version="29.0.3"> <diagram id="q1lMEfz3pfOFYU32vnCc" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="1152" dy="859" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-1" value="源端口" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="120" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-2" value="目的端口" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="120" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-3" value="段总长度" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="140" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-4" value="校验和" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="140" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-5" value="应用数据message" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="160" width="160" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-6" value="UDP段格式" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="205" y="240" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_FOr2Qi0I5cfiwnVKzIj-7" value="32 bits" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="320" y="110" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
